heading: Expenses
expenseQuestion: What regular monthly expenses does the defendant have? (Optional)
hintText: Select all that apply. The information the defendant provides must be truthful and accurate.

options.householdBills: Household bills (for example, council tax, gas, electricity, water, internet)
options.schoolCosts: School costs (for example, uniform and school dinners)

householdBillsAmount.required: Enter the amount the defendant pays for household bills
householdBillsAmount.negative: The amount the defendant pays for household bills each week or month must be £0.00 or above
householdBillsAmount.largeAmount: The amount the defendant pays for household bills each week or month must be less than £1 billion

householdBillsFrequency.required: Select how frequently the defendant pays household bills

loanPaymentsAmount.required: Enter the amount the defendant pays for loan payments
loanPaymentsAmount.negative: The amount the defendant pays for loan payments each week or month must be £0.00 or above
loanPaymentsAmount.largeAmount: The amount the defendant pays for loan payments each week or month must be less than £1 billion

loanPaymentsFrequency.required: Select how frequently the defendant makes loan payments

childSpousalMaintenanceAmount.required: Enter the amount the defendant pays for child or spousal maintenance
childSpousalMaintenanceAmount.negative: The amount the defendant pays for child or spousal maintenance each week or month must be £0.00 or above
childSpousalMaintenanceAmount.largeAmount: The amount the defendant pays for child or spousal maintenance each week or month must be less than £1 billion

childSpousalMaintenanceFrequency.required: Select how frequently the defendant pays child or spousal maintenance

mobilePhoneAmount.required: Enter the amount the defendant pays for a mobile phone
mobilePhoneAmount.negative: The amount the defendant pays for a mobile phone each week or month must be £0.00 or above
mobilePhoneAmount.largeAmount: The amount the defendant pays for a mobile phone each week or month must be less than £1 billion

mobilePhoneFrequency.required: Select how frequently the defendant pays for a mobile phone

groceryShoppingAmount.required: Enter the amount the defendant pays for grocery shopping
groceryShoppingAmount.negative: The amount the defendant pays for grocery shopping each week or month must be £0.00 or above
groceryShoppingAmount.largeAmount: The amount the defendant pays for grocery shopping each week or month must be less than £1 billion

groceryShoppingFrequency.required: Select how frequently the defendant pays for grocery shopping

fuelParkingTransportAmount.required: Enter the amount the defendant pays for fuel, parking and transport
fuelParkingTransportAmount.negative: The amount the defendant pays for fuel, parking and transport each week or month must be £0.00 or above
fuelParkingTransportAmount.largeAmount: The amount the defendant pays for fuel, parking and transport each week or month must be less than £1 billion

fuelParkingTransportFrequency.required: Select how frequently the defendant pays for fuel, parking and transport

schoolCostsAmount.required: Enter the amount the defendant pays for school costs
schoolCostsAmount.negative: The amount the defendant pays for school costs each week or month must be £0.00 or above
schoolCostsAmount.largeAmount: The amount the defendant pays for school costs each week or month must be less than £1 billion

schoolCostsFrequency.required: Select how frequently the defendant pays school costs

clothingAmount.required: Enter the amount the defendant pays for clothing
clothingAmount.negative: The amount the defendant pays for clothing each week or month must be £0.00 or above
clothingAmount.largeAmount: The amount the defendant pays for clothing each week or month must be less than £1 billion

clothingFrequency.required: Select how frequently the defendant pays for clothing

otherExpensesAmount.required: Enter the amount the defendant pays for other regular expenses
otherExpensesAmount.negative: The amount the defendant pays for other expenses each week or month must be £0.00 or above
otherExpensesAmount.largeAmount: The amount the defendant pays for other expenses each week or month must be less than £1 billion

otherExpensesFrequency.required: Select how frequently the defendant pays for other expenses

amount.invalidFormat: Enter an amount in the correct format, for example 148.00 or 148.50
